site.title: Say International Accessibility Task Force
site.tagline: Manlapud pankaukolan parad iyaplika ed saray publikon repo
nav.label: Unonan
meta.home.description: Say IATF et mangiyaalibansa na saray publikon open-source repository parad saray talagan kaukolan ya access.
meta.projects.description: Man-browse ed saray proyekto parad public accessibility ya impalapag panamegley na IATF.
meta.propose.description: Man-request na access project ed IATF panamegley na web, e-mail, odino Discord.
meta.governance.description: Basaen no panon ya aawaten na IATF iray proyekto, mangasikaso ed saray repositories, tan ipapaamta ed publiko iray kimey.
meta.join.description: Saray paraan pian makapibiang ed IATF: mangiter na code, mangipatalos, man-test, odino manmantini na proyekto.
meta.accessibility.description: No panon ya labay na IATF ya napansiansia iyan website ya mainomay ya na-access tan no panon ya ireport so problema ed access.
meta.transparency.description: Saray publikon rekord na IATF: saray desisyon, proyekto, tan update et naynay ya akalukas.
registry.empty.title: Anggapo ni ray ni-publish a proyekto
registry.empty.body: Ipaparaan na IATF so unonan publikon proyekto to.
proposal.form.title: Mangipasabi na kerew
proposal.form.body: Pilien so form ya walad leksab pian makapangipawit na kerew ed IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: Kaukolan so JavaScript pian nausar iyan web form. No anggapo, usaren so e-mail odino Discord.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Say live submission et ag-in-configure ed sayan environment. Sayan form so mangilukas na email client mo.
proposal.form.ready: Akaparaan lay secure submission. No ipawit mo so kerew, manggawa so IATF na rekord na intake.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Ipangasin kompletoen so spam protection check antis ya i-send.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Anampot la so proteksyon ed spam. Ipangasin kompletoen lamet so check antis ya i-send.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Agni na-verify so proteksyon ed spam ed sayan bekta. Salien lamet.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Asumpal lay panaon na panprotekta ed spam. Salien lamet so pan-check.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Ipangasin kompletoen iray kakaukolanen a pasen antis ya ibaki.
proposal.form.success: Awat mi so kerew yo tan in-save mi itan pian na-review.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: No ontawag ka lamet ed IATF nipaakar ed sayan kerew, ipila so reference ed leksab.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Walay agawan lingo legan ya ipapawit so kerew. Salien lamet. No mantutuloy so problema, usaren so e-mail.
project.detail.problemTitle: Anton problema so nasolusyonan na sayan proyekto
project.detail.whyTitle: No akin ya walay sayan proyekto
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Simplin Ingles a lapuan, saray patalos so nayarin niarum ed saginonor
footer.label: Say Footer na Site
footer.blurb: Nepeg a mainomay ya igapo, mainomay a pa-publish, tan mainomay so pansiansiaen a lukas so kimey ed inkapanginawaan.
footer.source: Referensya ed saray estandarte ed aksesibilidad: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/).Praktika ya ibabangat na saray manguusar na ontulong a teknolohiya.
contact.label: Kontak
translation.label: Status na Patalos
translation.source: Say salitan English so kanonikon pinagmulan na sayan pahina.
translation.humanReviewed: Sayan patalos so in-review na sakey a marundunong a managsalita.
translation.machineAssisted: Sayan patalos et tinmulong ed makina tan agni sigpot ya in-review na sakey a marundunong a managpatalos. Saray suhestion so naawat diad panamegley na GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Sayan patalos so in-revise antis na sankasampotan ya impang-update ed Ingles a pinagkasulatan tan nayarin kaukolan itan a revisen.
translation.report: I-report so problema ed panagpatalos: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Say Dios .
